docs.title: Welcome
docs.text: This site is a collection of sharing of learnings and knowledge in my leisure exploration of technologies in programming, software development and perhaps occasionally on my 3d printing.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: Started programming with assembly language. Did my uni courses mostly with C and X Windows time. Used mostly Java in my career.

docs.title: Reviving an old Jetson Nano and combine with with LLM development
docs.text:
I have had the Jetson Nano bought in 2020, the old version for sometime. Something I picked up during COVID lock-down period as a hobby interest.

Recently I decided to set it up as a Jetbot (refer here https://jetbot.org/master/), but found that Nvidia no longer maintain a consistent set of software for it, the updated software are mostly for the latest Jetson Orin Nano, and would not work with old one.

docs.title: Installing ready-made image
docs.text:
I installed the one here....

Here is the documentation of the attempt I made to piece

docs.title: Creating this github pages
docs.text:
I have at different times, outside of work, explored new development in technologies that are within my skills, which is in software development / programming.

As a 'hobby', often times I find myself forgetting what I did if I step away from the work for a while. I wish, at least, I would capture down some findings, or learnings for my own refresh when I get to next revisit the topic.

Writing this down would also help clarify my thoughts, and also it would be nice to share my learnings to a wider audience.
